film.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer: A Dream Come True
film.overview: A childhood encounter with actor Bobby Deol leaves an indelible mark on the mind of Nanhe who idolizes the actor.

dialogues.dialogue: I couldn't have inconvenienced others to keep my friend happy.  But as you say it's easy to make a friend... ...but very tough to keep the friendship.  I am proud of you. You have grown up.  You have a burning desire to learn and grow.   You must keep that going always.

But my friend is... Nanhe! - Yes.   You are my hero.  I am so proud that you have started studying, ...you have grown to be such a responsible young man.  Go to bed. You have to wake up early to...  ...visit your sister in her new home.   Go to bed.

dialogues.cause_raw: Friend's personal growth and desire to learn

dialogues.dialogue: Or you go visit him in Bombay at the end of this year. But my friend is...Nanhe! - Yes. - You are my hero.
